description: Example security alerts you can paste into Incident Narrator. These map to known scenarios in the Splunk BOTS v3 dataset (index=botsv3).

alerts.alert: Investigate suspected web application attack against imreallynotbatman.com in botsv3. Look for SQL injection, brute-force login attempts, or CMS exploitation in stream:http / access_combined, identify the attacker source IP, and determine what was compromised.

Investigate suspicious AWS activity in botsv3 aws:cloudtrail. Look for anomalous API calls, new IAM users/access keys, S3 bucket access, or privilege escalation, and identify the actor and affected cloud resources.

Investigate suspicious process execution on Windows endpoints in botsv3 using sysmon (xmlwineventlog) and wineventlog. Identify the affected host, the suspicious binary/command line, and any persistence mechanism.
Investigate possible data exfiltration in botsv3. Examine stream:dns for tunneling, web upload activity, and large outbound transfers; identify the source host and external destination.
